notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (road, river, home bays, turtles diving, logs, timer, lives, levels) working correctly, though turtle hitbox/grouping logic is slightly rough and the home bay wall rendering has a minor off-by-one visual quirk.
An excellent, fully-featured implementation of Frogger with diving turtles, detailed canvas graphics, and solid collision detection.
The game looks recognizably like Frogger and is mostly stable, but a serious key-handling bug makes movement unreliable/near-broken and level progression also incorrectly resets filled home bays.
